critical.mandate: Scan the actual project files — do not guess or assume

step.title: Scan Project
step.action: Identify source files, config files, existing documentation

step.title: Technology Detection
step.action: Identify tech stack from package.json, build files, configs
Detect frameworks, build tools, test frameworks

step.title: Structure Mapping
step.action: Identify key entry points and modules

step.title: Generate Documentation
step.action: Include: overview, tech stack, structure, conventions, key files

step.title: Generate Output
step.template-output: Generate project documentation with: overview, technology stack, directory structure, conventions, key files, and entry points.
